notes: pysystemtrade cross-sectional negative-skew factor (Rob Carver / pst-group, source_id 352af9de-f372-5cf2-9a86-681a26224597). EA runs one instance per registered host symbol; each instance reads the full 7-asset basket on D1 to compute neg_skew over 365D and 180D lookbacks, demeans the host's neg_skew against the cross-sectional all-asset mean (abs components) or the host asset-class mean (rv components), normalises by the cross-sectional robust vol, EWMA-smooths, scales, caps to [-20,20], averages to a combined forecast, and trades the host on +-5 entry / +-1 exit. No external feed: skew is a pure statistic of each symbol's own D1 return distribution over closed bars. Foreign reads are bound at call site via QM_SymbolGuardInit + QM_BasketWarmupHistory; one position per magic on the host symbol. Asset-class tags: FX={EURUSD,GBPUSD,USDJPY,AUDUSD}, indices={NDX,WS30}, commodity={XAUUSD}. All 7 assets verified present in dwx_symbol_matrix.csv.
